caption: A man wearing a tall, grey, textured wig, glasses, a white button-down shirt with suspenders, and a bowtie is seated in a room. He is wearing black headphones and is positioned in front of a professional microphone on a boom arm. The background consists of a wall decorated with numerous framed photographs and a clothing rack with garments, including a yellow shirt with "LEE" visible on the collar. Red and white logos appear on the screen, including one that reads "PODCAST" and another that says "S TALK JOY". Throughout the sequence, the man remains in a static position, speaking with slight movements of his mouth and facial expressions, while the camera remains still. No other people are present in the scene.
